mapper.select: SELECT id, name, duration_days, price, description, active FROM ai_ticket_plans WHERE active = true ORDER BY duration_days ASC, price ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, name, duration_days, price, description, active FROM ai_ticket_plans WHERE id = #{planId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_ticket_subscriptions ( host_id, plan_id, paid_price, started_at, expired_at, status ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{planId}, #{paidPrice}, #{startedAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{status} )
